1986-01-26: 1986 · Bears defeat New England Patriots 46–10 in Super Bowl XX
1929-02-14: 1929 · St. Valentine's Day Massacre: seven gangsters killed in a Lincoln Park garage
1992-04-13: 1992 · Great Chicago Flood: freight tunnel breach fills the Loop with river water
1914-04-23: 1914 · Wrigley Field (then Weeghman Park) opens on the North Side
1983-04-29: 1983 · Harold Washington inaugurated as Chicago's first Black mayor
1893-05-01: 1893 · World's Columbian Exposition opens in Jackson Park, drawing 27 million visitors
1973-05-03: 1973 · Sears Tower (now Willis Tower) topped out, becoming the world's tallest building
2010-06-09: 2010 · Blackhawks win first Stanley Cup in 49 years, defeating Philadelphia Flyers
1991-06-12: 1991 · Bulls win first NBA Championship, defeating the LA Lakers in five games
1997-06-13: 1997 · Bulls win fifth NBA Championship, defeating Utah Jazz in six games
1992-06-14: 1992 · Bulls win second NBA Championship, defeating Portland Trail Blazers
1998-06-14: 1998 · Bulls complete the second three-peat, defeating Utah Jazz — Jordan's last title
2015-06-15: 2015 · Blackhawks win third Stanley Cup in six seasons, defeating Tampa Bay Lightning
1996-06-16: 1996 · Bulls cap their 72-win season with a championship over Seattle SuperSonics
1993-06-20: 1993 · Bulls complete first three-peat, defeating Phoenix Suns in six games
2013-06-24: 2013 · Blackhawks rally to win Stanley Cup over Boston Bruins
1979-06-25: 1979 · American Airlines Flight 191 crashes at O'Hare, killing all 273 aboard
1915-07-24: 1915 · SS Eastland capsizes in the Chicago River, killing 844 passengers
1994-08-18: 1994 · United Center opens as new home of the Bulls and Blackhawks
1968-08-28: 1968 · Police clash with anti-war protesters at the Democratic National Convention
2003-09-29: 2003 · Rebuilt Soldier Field reopens after $660 million renovation
1871-10-08: 1871 · Great Chicago Fire begins, burning 17,000 structures over two days
2005-10-26: 2005 · White Sox sweep Houston Astros to win first World Series title since 1917
1993-10-31: 1993 · CTA Orange Line opens, connecting the Loop to Midway Airport
2016-11-02: 2016 · Cubs defeat Cleveland Indians in Game 7, ending a 108-year World Series drought
